seoTitle: How to Design Product Packaging in Canva
metaDescription: Design engaging product packaging in Canva using templates, graphics, and brand elements to help your product stand out on shelves.
intro: Packaging is often a customer's first physical interaction with your brand, so getting the design right matters. This guide walks through using Canva's templates and tools to build product packaging from scratch, including how to work in brand elements and graphics. It's aimed at entrepreneurs and small business owners launching or refreshing a product line.

steps.heading: Explore Canva templates
steps.body: Browse packaging-specific templates to find a starting layout that fits your product.

steps.heading: Customize your packaging
steps.body: Adjust colors, text, and structure so the template reflects your product and brand.

steps.heading: Use graphics and illustrations
steps.body: Add supporting visuals that reinforce your product's identity and appeal on the shelf.

steps.heading: Finalize your design
steps.body: Review the complete packaging layout for consistency before exporting for print.

faq.question: Can Canva packaging designs be sent directly to a printer?
faq.answer: You can export high-resolution files suitable for most printers, though it's worth confirming specs with your print vendor.

faq.question: Do I need packaging design experience to use these templates?
faq.answer: No, the templates are built for non-designers, so mainly your product content and branding are needed.

faq.question: Can I incorporate my existing brand kit into packaging designs?
faq.answer: Yes, pulling in your saved brand colors and fonts helps keep packaging consistent with your other materials.
